name: phase-38.4-baseline
description: Phase-38.4 planner-executor coordination — plan creation, execution, amendments.

prompts.message: Create a plan to add OAuth2 login and then execute the first slice.
Run the current plan and report back when slice 3 completes.
The executor failed on slice 5. Diagnose the failure and retry.
Pause the current run, apply a hotfix to the plan, then resume.
Draft a plan for adding email notifications and execute slices 1 through 3 back-to-back.
Execute the plan but stop after each slice so I can review.
Slice 2 produced a gate failure — investigate and propose a fix.
Abort the in-flight run, restore the working tree, and report what was rolled back.
Plan a migration for the notification schema and queue it as draft, do not execute.
Resume the plan from slice 4 but skip slice 5 and continue with 6.
The planner emitted a slice that violates the scope contract — reject it and regenerate.
Execute slice 7 twice with different quorum modes to compare outcomes.
